assignment.title: Year 7 Forces Vocabulary Check
assignment.instructions: Use the key vocabulary to help answer each question.

keyVocabulary.englishDefinition: A push or pull that can change how an object moves.
keyVocabulary.chineseDefinition: 可以改变物体运动方式的推或拉。

definitionI18n.en: A push or pull that can change how an object moves.
definitionI18n.zh: 可以改变物体运动方式的推或拉。

keyVocabulary.englishDefinition: A force that slows movement when surfaces rub together.
keyVocabulary.chineseDefinition: 当表面相互摩擦时使运动减慢的力。

definitionI18n.en: A force that slows movement when surfaces rub together.
definitionI18n.zh: 当表面相互摩擦时使运动减慢的力。

questions.prompt: What is one example of a force?

textI18n.en: What is one example of a force?

questions.prompt: Explain how friction affects a bicycle slowing down.

textI18n.en: Explain how friction affects a bicycle slowing down.
textI18n.zh: 解释摩擦力如何影响正在减速的自行车。

instructionsI18n.en: Use the key vocabulary to help answer each question.
instructionsI18n.zh: 使用关键词汇帮助你回答每一道题。
